nasb.text: Then the Lord answered me and said, “Record the vision And inscribe it on tablets, That the one who reads it may run.

esv.text: And the Lord answered me: “Write the vision; make it plain on tablets, so he may run who reads it.

cnv.text: 耶和華回答我說： “把異象寫下，清楚地記在泥版上， 使讀的人容易明白，

ccb.text: 耶和华对我说： “将我的启示记下来， 清楚地刻在版上， 便于人们阅读。
